# MicroservicesArchitecture — architect

> Recipe: Comprehensive workflow for designing, implementing, and deploying a microservices architecture.

System: {{system_name}}
Domain: {{business_domain}}
Scale: {{scale_requirements}}

Design microservices architecture:
1. Bounded contexts and services
2. Service responsibilities
3. Communication patterns (sync/async)
4. Data consistency strategy
5. Fault tolerance approach
6. Monitoring and logging
7. Deployment topology

When you are done, hand off to the next agent in the chain.
